FSM_OBJECTS

Table for storing abstract FSM instances as the central reference to all FSM classes.

Columns
fsm_id (`number`)

Technical key, generated from FSM_SEQ, primary key.

fsm_fcl_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Document class, reference to FSM_CLASSES.

fsm_fsc_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Document subclass, used to distinguish transition flows per class.

fsm_fst_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Current document status, reference to FSM_STATUS.

fsm_fev_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Optional event to retrigger due to an error, reference to FSM_EVENTS.

fsm_retry_schedule (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Optional schedule name defining when FSM_FEV_ID is retriggered.

fsm_validity (`number`)

Current validity of the FSM: 0 = OK, 1 = Error, values above 1 indicate additional retries will follow.

fsm_fev_list (`varchar2(500 char)`)

List of currently allowed next events.

fsm_last_change_date (`date`)

Date of the last successful activity or event affecting the object.

fsm_status_change_date (`date`)

Date of the last actual status change of the object.

Dependencies
fsm_fcl_id

references FSM_CLASSES (fcl_id)

fsm_fev_id, fsm_fcl_id

references FSM_EVENTS (fev_id, fev_fcl_id)

fsm_fst_id, fsm_fcl_id

references FSM_STATUS (fst_id, fst_fcl_id)
